response.justification: Bogdan brings over a decade of highly relevant engineering experience, strongly aligning with the required TypeScript, Node.js, and React stack. His recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, combined with deep expertise in testing methodologies and secondary Java exposure, makes him an exceptional fit for this Senior Fullstack position.
strengths: Extensive full-stack TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience
Directly relevant experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP
Deep expertise in software testing, TDD, and CI/CD pipelines
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest
Current Staff/Founder level might indicate he is overqualified for a standard Senior IC role
Slightly fragmented tenure in the earlier years of his career
